paper_record.title: Coexistence of d-Wave Altermagnetism and Topological States in Janus FeSeX (X = S, Te) Monolayers
paper_record.abstract: The interplay between unconventional magnetism and band topology in two-dimensional materials has emerged as an important theme in condensed matter physics. Here, we present first-principles calculations that reveal the coexistence of d-wave altermagnetism and topological behavior in Janus FeSeX (X = S, Te) monolayers. The chemical asymmetry of the Janus structure breaks both out-of-plane mirror and inversion symmetries, leading to anisotropic exchange interactions and momentum-dependent spin splittings even in the absence of spin-orbit coupling, the defining signature of altermagnetism. Phonon dispersion analyses confirm the dynamical stability of both compounds, while strain-dependent calculations demonstrate that the magnitude of the altermagnetic exchange splitting ($Δ_s$) can be efficiently tuned by biaxial strain. When spin-orbit coupling is included, a finite topological band gap emerges at the Fermi level, accompanied by quantized spin Hall conductivity plateaus and nontrivial topological invariants (spin Chern number = 1, Z2=1). These findings establish FeSeS and FeSeTe as promising two-dimensional platforms for realizing topological altermagnetism and spin--orbit--driven charge--spin conversion, thus opening new avenues for low-dissipation spintronic devices.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 研究发现 Janus FeSeX (X=S, Te) 单层中存在 d 波交错磁性与拓扑量子自旋霍尔态的共存。
one_sentence_summary.en: The study reveals the coexistence of d-wave altermagnetism and topological quantum spin Hall states in Janus FeSeX (X=S, Te) monolayers.

problem.zh: 在二维材料中寻找能够同时具备无净磁化、高自旋极化以及拓扑保护边缘态的“拓扑交错磁体”候选材料。
problem.en: Searching for 2D 'topological altermagnet' candidates that simultaneously possess zero net magnetization, high spin polarization, and topologically protected edge states.

approach.zh: 采用第一性原理计算研究 Janus 结构的动力学稳定性，分析对称性破缺诱导的自旋分裂，并计算自旋霍尔电导率与拓扑不变量。
approach.en: Using first-principles calculations to investigate the dynamical stability of Janus structures, analyze symmetry-breaking induced spin splitting, and compute spin Hall conductivity and topological invariants.

main_takeaway.zh: Janus FeSeX 单层通过化学非对称性打破反演对称性，实现了应变可调的 d 波交错磁性自旋分裂，并在自旋轨道耦合作用下展现出量子自旋霍尔效应。
main_takeaway.en: Janus FeSeX monolayers achieve strain-tunable d-wave altermagnetic spin splitting via chemical asymmetry and exhibit the quantum spin Hall effect under spin-orbit coupling.

why_it_matters.zh: 该发现为低功耗自旋电子学器件提供了一个理想的二维平台，结合了反铁磁体的高动力学特性与拓扑绝缘体的无耗散传输优势。
why_it_matters.en: This discovery provides an ideal 2D platform for low-power spintronic devices, combining the high-speed dynamics of antiferromagnets with the dissipationless transport of topological insulators.

reason.zh: 首次在具体的 Janus 铁基硫属化合物中预测了交错磁性与拓扑态的共存，并展示了应变对自旋极化的有效调控。
reason.en: First prediction of the coexistence of altermagnetism and topological states in specific Janus iron chalcogenides, demonstrating effective strain control of spin polarization.

reason.zh: 该研究涉及深入的对称性分析、电子结构计算及拓扑物性表征，非常符合 PRB 的风格。
reason.en: The study involves in-depth symmetry analysis, electronic structure calculations, and topological characterization, aligning well with PRB's scope.
